schema.name: CiscoUmbrellaAdminAudit_CL
schema.description: The Cisco Secure Access Admin Audit logs show the administrative changes to your organization's Secure Access settings.

columns.name: Id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the admin audit event.

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: The date and time of the administrative change event, expressed as a UTC-formatted string.

columns.name: Email
columns.description: The email of the user that triggered the event.

columns.name: User
columns.description: The account name of the user who created the change.

columns.name: AuditType
columns.description: Where the change was made, such as settings or a policy.

columns.name: Action
columns.description: The type of change made, such as Create, update, or Delete.

columns.name: Before
columns.description: The policy or setting before the change was made.

columns.name: After
columns.description: The policy or setting after the change was made.
